content.text: ICFRE-FRI Group C Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about ICFRE-FRI Group C Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: ICFRE-Forest Research Institute (FRI), Dehradun (Uttarakhand) Various Group C Posts Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 1/FRI/GC/2026 Short Details
Notification Out : 04/05/2026 Starting Date : 04/05/2026 Last Date : 03/06/2026 11:59 PM CBT Stage-I Exam Date : June 2026 (Tentative)
Gen / OBC / EWS : 1500/- SC / ST / PH : 700/- All Females : 700/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : Given Below Age Limit as on : 03/06/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Computer Based Test (CBT) Descriptive Exam (Essay & Letter) Skill Test / Physical Test (Post Wise) Medical Examination Document Verification

Library Information Assistant : Bachelor’s degree in Library Science. Technical Assistant (Field/ Lab Research) : Bachelor’s degree with Botany/ Zoology/ Forestry Environment Ecology /Bio Technology/ Genetics/ Micro Biology/ Geology/ Bio-Chemistry as one of Subject. Stenographer Grade-II : 12th Class Passed, Stenography Speed (English / Hindi) : 80 wpm, Certificate Course in Computer Applications Typing Speed 05 Key Depression for Each Word. Technician (Field/ Lab Research) : 12th Pass in Science (60% Marks). Store Keeper : 12th Class Passed. Technician (Maintenance) : 10th Passed and ITI in the Related Trade. Lower Division Clerk (LDC) : 12th Passed, Typing (English : 35 wpm / Hindi : 30 wpm). Forest Guard : 12th Class Passed. Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) : 10th Class Passed.
